mapper.select: SELECT n.id AS id, n.title AS title, n.content AS content, n.remark AS remark, n.owner_type AS ownerType, n.owner_id AS ownerId, CASE WHEN n.owner_type = 'PROJECT' THEN p.title WHEN n.owner_type = 'GOAL' THEN g.title END AS ownerName, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS taskCount, n.update_time AS updateTime FROM mobe_node n LEFT JOIN mobe_project p ON n.owner_type = 'PROJECT' AND p.id = n.owner_id AND p.user_id = n.user_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_goal g ON n.owner_type = 'GOAL' AND g.id = n.owner_id AND g.user_id = n.user_id AND g.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_item t ON t.user_id = n.user_id AND t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' AND t.direct_owner_id = n.id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY n.id, n.title, n.content, n.remark, n.owner_type, n.owner_id, p.title, g.title, n.update_time
